title: Odeya AdmissionEvidenceBundle
description: A closed immutable index of the exact deterministic evidence used by one post-registry command admission. The CommandContractRecord selects the evidence profile and required families. The bundle retains references and input/frontier digests, never mutable state snapshots. The canonical twelve-stage sequence is structurally ordered exactly once; accepted/noop results admit only pass/not-applicable stages, while a rejected result has one terminal fail/indeterminate stage and an explicit not-run suffix. Structural validity still does not prove reference truth, evidence-profile applicability, evidence-record resolution, rule execution, currentness, digest equality, or that the receipt disposition follows from the underlying evidence.
